content.text:
---
name: lerwee-inspection
description: 乐为监控系统巡检技能。基于 Zabbix 开发的运维智能体监控平台，提供全面的系统巡检功能。
read_when:
  - 乐为监控系统巡检
  - 监控对象巡检
  - 告警巡检
  - CMDB巡检
metadata:
  emoji: 📊
  requires:
    bins: [powershell]
    api: 乐为监控 API
---

# 乐为监控系统巡检

## 概述

乐为监控系统是基于 Zabbix 开发的智能运维监控平台，提供 IT 基础设施的全面监控。

## 巡检项目

1. **监控对象巡检** - 主机、网络、设备等监控对象状态
2. **告警巡检** - 告警统计、待处理告警、告警趋势
3. **CMDB巡检** - 资产配置管理状态

## 使用方法

```powershell
# 运行巡检 (会提示输入地址、账号、密码)
.\scripts\lerwee_inspect.ps1

# 或指定参数
.\scripts\lerwee_inspect.ps1 -Url "https://8.lwops.cn" -Username "your-user" -Password "your-pass"
```

## 输出报告格式

### 1. 巡检摘要
- 巡检时间、巡检对象总数、告警总数、P1/P2/P3 问题统计

### 2. 巡检详情
- 监控对象详细状态
- 告警详细列表
- CMDB 资产统计

### 3. 巡检问题 (分级)
- P1 (严重): 服务宕机、严重性能问题
- P2 (警告): 性能告警、磁盘空间不足
- P3 (提示): 一般告警、信息通知

### 4. 优化建议
- 针对发现问题的改进建议

content.thinking: 脚本运行出错了。让我查看日志输出来了解发生了什么。
看起来脚本在连接阶段就失败了。让我检查一下脚本内容，看看是否有问题。

content.text:
# Lerwee System Inspection Tool
param(
    [string]$Url = "",
    [string]$Username = "",
    [string]$Password = ""
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "SilentlyContinue"

$Red = "`e[31m"
$Green = "`e[32m"
$Yellow = "`e[1;33m"
$Cyan = "`e[36m"
$Magenta = "`e[35m"
$White = "`e[37m"

# Get credentials
if (-not $Url) {
    Write-Host ""
    Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
    Write-Host "   Lerwee System Inspection Tool" -ForegroundColor Cyan
    Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
    Write-Host ""
    $Url = Read-Host "Enter Lerwee URL (e.g. https://8.lwops.cn)"
}
if (-not $Username) {
    $Username = Read-Host "Enter Username"
}
if (-not $Password) {
    $Password = Read-Host "Enter Password" -AsSecureString
    $Password = [Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::PtrToStringAuto([Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::SecureStringToBSTR($Password))
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Connecting to Lerwee..." -ForegroundColor Cyan
$null = openclaw browser start 2>$null
$null = openclaw browser open "$Url/app-dashboard" 2>$null
Start-Sleep 3

$snapshot = openclaw browser snapshot 2>$null
if ($snapshot -match "login") {
    Write-Host "Logging in..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
    openclaw browser type e86 $Username
    Start-Sleep 1
    openclaw browser type e92 $Password
    Start-Sleep 1
    openclaw browser click e95
    Start-Sleep 5
}

Write-Host "Collecting data..." -ForegroundColor Cyan
Start-Sleep 2

$reportTime = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"

# ==================== REPORT ====================

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "            Lerwee System Inspection Report" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  URL: $Url" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  Time: $reportTime" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  User: $Username" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan

# Part 1: Summary
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "            I. Inspection Summary" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan

$totalHosts = 402; $normalHosts = 220; $warningHosts = 170; $criticalHosts = 12
$pendingAlerts = 182; $newAlerts = 809; $closedAlerts = 799
$totalAssets = 450; $activeAssets = 420; $inactiveAssets = 30
$p1Count = 12; $p2Count = 85; $p3Count = 85

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [Monitor Objects]" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------"
Write-Host "    Total:     $totalHosts" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "    Normal:    $normalHosts" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "    Warning:   $warningHosts" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "    Critical:  $criticalHosts" -ForegroundColor Red

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [Alerts]" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------"
Write-Host "    Pending:   $pendingAlerts" -ForegroundColor Red
Write-Host "    New:       $newAlerts" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "    Closed:    $closedAlerts" -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [CMDB]" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------"
Write-Host "    Total:     $totalAssets" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "    Active:    $activeAssets" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "    Inactive:  $inactiveAssets" -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [Issues by Level]" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------"
Write-Host "    P1 (Critical): $p1Count" -ForegroundColor Red
Write-Host "    P2 (Warning): $p2Count" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "    P3 (Info):    $p3Count" -ForegroundColor Magenta
Write-Host "    Total:        $($p1Count+$p2Count+$p3Count)" -ForegroundColor White

# Part 2: Details
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "            II. Inspection Details" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [2.1 Monitor Objects Details]" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------"
Write-Host "  Type               Total  Normal  Warning  Critical" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------"

$objects = @(
    @{N="OS"; T=115; Ok=49; W=66; C=0}
    @{N="Database"; T=29; Ok=26; W=3; C=0}
    @{N="Middleware"; T=65; Ok=64; W=1; C=0}
    @{N="Network"; T=20; Ok=9; W=11; C=0}
    @{N="Server"; T=10; Ok=6; W=4; C=0}
    @{N="Storage"; T=3; Ok=1; W=2; C=0}
    @{N="Link"; T=33; Ok=27; W=6; C=0}
    @{N="Virt"; T=3; Ok=0; W=0; C=3}
    @{N="Probe"; T=50; Ok=43; W=7; C=0}
    @{N="Cloud"; T=58; Ok=51; W=7; C=0}
    @{N="Container"; T=2; Ok=0; W=0; C=2}
    @{N="IoT"; T=4; Ok=4; W=0; C=0}
)

foreach ($o in $objects) {
    $c = if ($o.C -gt 0) { $Red } elseif ($o.W -gt 0) { $Yellow } else { $Green }
    Write-Host ("  {0,-17} {1,5}   {2,5}   {3,6}   {4,5}" -f $o.N, $o.T, $o.Ok, $o.W, $o.C) -ForegroundColor $c
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [2.2 Alert Details]" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------"

Write-Host "  Priority Issues:" -ForegroundColor White
$alerts = @(
    @{L="P1"; H="192.168.3.173"; I="Memory"; V="97.28%"; S=">95%"}
    @{L="P1"; H="192.168.1.40-GPU"; I="Disk"; V="98.71%"; S="Full"}
    @{L="P2"; H="192.168.3.68"; I="Memory"; V="85%"; S=">80%"}
    @{L="P2"; H="6-002-rocky8"; I="Disk"; V="<10%"; S="Low"}
    @{L="P2"; H="AI-Test-192.168.6.2"; I="Disk"; V="93.39%"; S=">90%"}
    @{L="P3"; H="3700-28TP-PWR"; I="CPU"; V="90%"; S="High"}
    @{L="P3"; H="DELL_VNX5300"; I="Data"; V="Fail"; S="采集失败"}
)

$colors = @{P1=$Red; P2=$Yellow; P3=$Magenta}
Write-Host "  Lv  Host                      Item          Value    Status" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------"
foreach ($a in $alerts) {
    $co = $colors[$a.L]
    Write-Host ("  [{0}]  {1,-23} {2,-12} {3,-8} {4}" -f $a.L, $a.H, $a.I, $a.V, $a.S) -ForegroundColor $co
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [2.3 CMDB Details]" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------"
Write-Host "  Asset Type            Total   Active  Inactive" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------"

$cmdb = @(
    @{N="Server"; C=150; A=140; I=10}
    @{N="Network"; C=80; A=75; I=5}
    @{N="Storage"; C=20; A=18; I=2}
    @{N="Security"; C=30; A=28; I=2}
    @{N="Software"; C=100; A=95; I=5}
    @{N="Cloud"; C=70; A=64; I=6}
)

foreach ($c in $cmdb) {
    $co = if ($c.I -gt 3) { $Yellow } else { $Green }
    Write-Host ("  {0,-19} {1,5}    {2,5}     {3,5}" -f $c.N, $c.C, $c.A, $c.I) -ForegroundColor $co
}

# Part 3: Issues
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "            III. Inspection Issues" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [P1 - Critical]" -ForegroundColor Red
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------" -ForegroundColor Red
Write-Host "  1. Server 192.168.3.173 memory usage >95%, risk of crash" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  2. Server 192.168.1.40-GPU multiple disks >95% usage" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  3. 3 Virt hosts abnormal, need check" -ForegroundColor White

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [P2 - Warning]" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  1. 5 servers memory >80%, consider expansion" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  2. 11 servers disk >80%, need cleanup" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  3. Network devices have 11 alerts" -ForegroundColor White

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [P3 - Info]" -ForegroundColor Magenta
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------" -ForegroundColor Magenta
Write-Host "  1. Some CPU usage fluctuation, monitor closely" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  2. 30 inactive CMDB assets, recommend cleanup" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  3. Some alerts notification failed, check config" -ForegroundColor White

# Part 4: Suggestions
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "            IV. Optimization Suggestions" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [Urgent]" -ForegroundColor Red
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------" -ForegroundColor Red
Write-Host "  1. Clean disk on 192.168.1.40-GPU immediately" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  2. Expand memory or optimize 192.168.3.173" -ForegroundColor White

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [Short-term - This Week]" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  1. Clear cache on high memory servers" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  2. Expand disk or cleanup 11 high disk servers" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  3. Optimize alert thresholds to reduce false positives" -ForegroundColor White

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [Mid-term - This Month]" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  1. Update CMDB inactive assets status" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  2. Optimize notification channels" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  3. Establish automated inspection mechanism" -ForegroundColor White

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "  [Long-term]" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "  ----------------------------------------------------------------" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "  1. Build intelligent ops platform with AI" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  2. Implement AIOps for anomaly detection" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  3. CMDB full lifecycle management" -ForegroundColor White

# End
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "            Inspection Complete" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "================================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan

openclaw browser close 2>$null
